mapper.select: WITH CAL AS ( SELECT CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AS DT UNION ALL SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 1, DT) FROM CAL WHERE DT < CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ) SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAL.DT, 23) AS workDate, DATEPART(WEEKDAY, CAL.DT) AS dayOfWeekNum, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_CODE, '') AS shiftCode, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_NAME, '') AS shiftName, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), s.WORK_ON_HHMM, 108) AS workOnHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), s.WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108) AS workOffHhmm, CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS workDayType FROM CAL LEFT JOIN HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr ON tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAL.DT AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAL.DT) LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON dept.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pm.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAL.DT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON pd.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND pd.SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE ORDER BY CAL.DT OPTION (MAXRECURSION 62)

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS workDate, r.REQ_ID AS requestId, r.REQ_GROUP AS requestCategory, r.REQ_TYPE AS requestWorkCode, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, r.STATUS AS status FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID WHERE r.COMPANY = #{company} AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND r.TARGET_DATE BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ORDER BY r.TARGET_DATE, r.REQ_ID

SELECT YYYYMMDD AS yyyymmdd, SHIFT_CODE AS shiftCode, ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE AS actualShiftCode, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS checkIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS checkOut, WORK_MIN AS workMin, OVERNIGHT_YN AS overnightYn, LATE_YN AS lateYn, LATE_MIN AS lateMin FROM HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND YYYYMMDD BETWEEN #{startYmd} AND #{endYmd}

WITH SubDepts AS ( SELECT DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND USE_YN = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 d INNER JOIN SubDepts s ON d.PARENT_DEPT = s.DEPT_CODE WHERE d.COMPANY = #{company} AND d.USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SubDepts ORDER BY DEPT_CODE OPTION (MAXRECURSION 20)

SELECT h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 d ON h.COMPANY = d.COMPANY AND h.DEPT_CODE = d.DEPT_CODE WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
mapper.update: MERGE HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 AS T USING ( SELECT base.COMPANY, base.EMP_CODE, base.YYYYMMDD, base.DEPT_CODE, base.SHIFT_CODE, finalTime.CHECK_IN, finalTime.CHECK_OUT, CASE WHEN finalMin.OUT_MIN < finalMin.IN_MIN THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OVERNIGHT_YN, CASE WHEN workCalc.WORK_MIN < 0 THEN 0 ELSE workCalc.WORK_MIN END AS WORK_MIN, CASE WHEN finalMin.IN_MIN > base.PLAN_IN_MIN THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS LATE_YN, CASE WHEN finalMin.IN_MIN > base.PLAN_IN_MIN THEN finalMin.IN_MIN - base.PLAN_IN_MIN ELSE 0 END AS LATE_MIN FROM ( SELECT h.COMPANY, h.EMP_CODE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CONVERT(DATE, #{yyyymmdd}, 112), 112) AS YYYYMMDD, h.DEPT_CODE, s.SHIFT_CODE, s.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM, s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, s.BREAK1_END_HHMM, s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, s.BREAK2_END_HHMM, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), s.WORK_ON_HHMM) AS PLAN_IN_MIN FROM HRIMASTER01 h JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND dept.DEPT_CODE = h.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CONVERT(DATE, #{yyyymmdd}, 112)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS WORK_DAY_TYPE ) day_type WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND h.RETIRE_DATE IS NULL AND day_type.WORK_DAY_TYPE = 'WORK' AND s.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND s.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL ) base LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 ex ON ex.COMPANY = base.COMPANY AND ex.EMP_CODE = base.EMP_CODE AND ex.YYYYMMDD = base.YYYYMMDD CROSS APPLY ( SELECT ISNULL(ex.CHECK_IN, base.WORK_ON_HHMM) AS CHECK_IN, ISNULL(ex.CHECK_OUT, base.WORK_OFF_HHMM) AS CHECK_OUT ) finalTime CROSS APPLY ( SELECT DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), finalTime.CHECK_IN) AS IN_MIN, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), finalTime.CHECK_OUT) AS RAW_OUT_MIN ) rawMin CROSS APPLY ( SELECT rawMin.IN_MIN AS IN_MIN, CASE WHEN rawMin.RAW_OUT_MIN < rawMin.IN_MIN THEN rawMin.RAW_OUT_MIN + 1440 ELSE rawMin.RAW_OUT_MIN END AS OUT_MIN ) finalMin CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN base.BREAK1_START_HHMM IS NULL OR base.BREAK1_END_HHMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK1_START_HHMM) END AS B1_START_MIN, CASE WHEN base.BREAK1_START_HHMM IS NULL OR base.BREAK1_END_HHMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK1_END_HHMM) < DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK1_START_HHMM) THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK1_END_HHMM) + 1440 ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK1_END_HHMM) END END AS B1_END_MIN, CASE WHEN base.BREAK2_START_HHMM IS NULL OR base.BREAK2_END_HHMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK2_START_HHMM) END AS B2_START_MIN, CASE WHEN base.BREAK2_START_HHMM IS NULL OR base.BREAK2_END_HHMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK2_END_HHMM) < DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK2_START_HHMM) THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK2_END_HHMM) + 1440 ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), base.BREAK2_END_HHMM) END END AS B2_END_MIN ) rawBreak CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN rawBreak.B1_START_MIN IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN finalMin.OUT_MIN > 1440 AND rawBreak.B1_START_MIN < finalMin.IN_MIN THEN rawBreak.B1_START_MIN + 1440 ELSE rawBreak.B1_START_MIN END AS B1_START_MIN, CASE WHEN rawBreak.B1_END_MIN IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN finalMin.OUT_MIN > 1440 AND rawBreak.B1_START_MIN < finalMin.IN_MIN THEN rawBreak.B1_END_MIN + 1440 ELSE rawBreak.B1_END_MIN END AS B1_END_MIN, CASE WHEN rawBreak.B2_START_MIN IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN finalMin.OUT_MIN > 1440 AND rawBreak.B2_START_MIN < finalMin.IN_MIN THEN rawBreak.B2_START_MIN + 1440 ELSE rawBreak.B2_START_MIN END AS B2_START_MIN, CASE WHEN rawBreak.B2_END_MIN IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN finalMin.OUT_MIN > 1440 AND rawBreak.B2_START_MIN < finalMin.IN_MIN THEN rawBreak.B2_END_MIN + 1440 ELSE rawBreak.B2_END_MIN END AS B2_END_MIN ) adjBreak CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN adjBreak.B1_START_MIN IS NULL OR finalMin.OUT_MIN <= adjBreak.B1_START_MIN OR adjBreak.B1_END_MIN <= finalMin.IN_MIN THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN finalMin.OUT_MIN < adjBreak.B1_END_MIN THEN finalMin.OUT_MIN ELSE adjBreak.B1_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN finalMin.IN_MIN > adjBreak.B1_START_MIN THEN finalMin.IN_MIN ELSE adjBreak.B1_START_MIN END) END + CASE WHEN adjBreak.B2_START_MIN IS NULL OR finalMin.OUT_MIN <= adjBreak.B2_START_MIN OR adjBreak.B2_END_MIN <= finalMin.IN_MIN THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN finalMin.OUT_MIN < adjBreak.B2_END_MIN THEN finalMin.OUT_MIN ELSE adjBreak.B2_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN finalMin.IN_MIN > adjBreak.B2_START_MIN THEN finalMin.IN_MIN ELSE adjBreak.B2_START_MIN END) END AS BREAK_MIN ) breakCalc CROSS APPLY ( SELECT finalMin.OUT_MIN - finalMin.IN_MIN - ISNULL(breakCalc.BREAK_MIN, 0) AS WORK_MIN ) workCalc ) AS S ON T.COMPANY = S.COMPANY AND T.EMP_CODE = S.EMP_CODE AND T.YYYYMMDD = S.YYYYMMDD WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DEPT_CODE = S.DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE = S.SHIFT_CODE, CHECK_IN = ISNULL(T.CHECK_IN, S.CHECK_IN), CHECK_OUT = ISNULL(T.CHECK_OUT, S.CHECK_OUT), WORK_MIN = S.WORK_MIN, OVERNIGHT_YN = S.OVERNIGHT_YN, LATE_YN = S.LATE_YN, LATE_MIN = S.LATE_MIN, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD, DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT, WORK_MIN, OVERNIGHT_YN, LATE_YN, LATE_MIN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (S.COMPANY, S.EMP_CODE, S.YYYYMMDD, S.DEPT_CODE, S.SHIFT_CODE, S.CHECK_IN, S.CHECK_OUT, S.WORK_MIN, S.OVERNIGHT_YN, S.LATE_YN, S.LATE_MIN, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
